title: A Guide to Writing Successful Field-Initiated Research Grant Proposals (Spencer Foundation)
display_label: Spencer Foundation Field-Initiated Grant Proposals Guide (PDF)
content: Spencer Foundation guide (dated 2020-11-20) on writing successful field-initiated research grant proposals. Distributed by ORA as a companion resource to Tracy Rone's 2023-02-27 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Strategies for Grant Proposal Development'. Especially relevant to education and social science researchers pursuing Spencer Foundation funding.
